title: Water Breathe
description: Use a heart of the sea on any mob to grant them infinite water breathing!
body:
**Water Breathe** is a simple quality-of-life mod that allows the player to interact with any entity to grant it permanent water breathing! 

This makes building habitats and enclosures for pesky critters that keep drowning much more feasible! The mod was made specifically for the Menagerie modpack by [jamono](https://x.com/MCMenagerie), but feel free to use it in your own modpacks!
